emails.body: EnronOnline Guest ID and Password Mark, Dave Forster had forwarded your voice mail to me requesting an active ID and Password. Your Id is as follows: Id: EOL67313 Password: WELCOME! I have also left you a voice mail with the same information. If you have any problems with your access, you can contact me at x34523 Thanks TARA x34523
